code:
%%{FinTech_AuthVault}}}%%

stateDiagram-v2
    [FinTech_LedgerService] --> Idle
    
    Idle --> Monitoring: CRON tick / YieldSnapshot event
    
    Monitoring --> Comparing: Collect APY data
    
    Comparing --> NoAction: APY diff < 0.5%
    Comparing --> SmallRebalance: APY diff >= 0.5% && change < 50%
    Comparing --> LargeRebalance: APY diff >= 0.5% && change >= 50%
    
    NoAction --> Idle: emit RebalanceSkipped
    
    SmallRebalance --> Executing: emit Callback(FinTech_FraudDetection)
    
    LargeRebalance --> PendingFinality: Queue rebalance
    PendingFinality --> PendingFinality: Wait 64 blocks
    PendingFinality --> Executing: Finality reached
    
    Executing --> Completed: Rebalance executed
    Completed --> Idle: Reset
    
    note right of Monitoring
        Every ~12 minutes
        or on manual trigger
    end note
    
    note right of PendingFinality
        Safety measure for
        large TVL changes
    end note

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要给LedgerService画一个状态流转图，核心场景是自动再平衡。系统启动后先进入Idle状态，然后有个Monitoring监控态，每12分钟由CRON触发或者手动触发。
明白，Idle到Monitoring的触发条件我写"CRON tick / YieldSnapshot event"可以吗？另外Monitoring之后做什么？
可以。Monitoring之后进入Comparing状态，去收集各池子的APY数据做比对。这里要分出三条分支：APY差异小于0.5%就走NoAction；等于0.5%且变动小于50%走SmallRebalance；等于0.5%且变动达到50%走LargeRebalance。
好的，三条分支都画好了。NoAction之后emit RebalanceSkipped回到Idle。SmallRebalance需要先调FinTech_FraudDetection做风控回调，然后进入Executing。
LargeRebalance那条线要加一个PendingFinality状态，大额资金变动必须等64个区块确认，这是安全机制。等Finality reached之后再进Executing。
理解了，PendingFinality有个自循环Wait 64 blocks，确认完成后到Executing，最后Completed重置回Idle。我在Monitoring和PendingFinality旁边加两个注释说明触发频率和安全机制，你看可以吗？
稍等，SmallRebalance到Executing的箭头条件应该是"emit Callback(FinTech_FraudDetection)"，不是直接执行。还有PendingFinality的自循环条件写成"Wait 64 blocks"更准确，不是简单的循环。
已修正，SmallRebalance的触发条件改成emit Callback(FinTech_FraudDetection)，PendingFinality的自循环标注为Wait 64 blocks。整个状态图从LedgerService启动到Idle，经过监控、比对、风控或等待确认，最终完成再平衡后重置，流程已经完整。
